title: In northern Israel, relief at the cease-fire is overshadowed by unease.
summary_full: Residents are wary that the truce may offer only a temporary reprieve after weeks of rocket fire by Hezbollah.
summary_public: Residents are wary that the truce may offer only a temporary reprieve after weeks of rocket fire by Hezbollah.

IL.label: neutral
